commands: emote says in a bored tone, 'Welcome to Haven, stranger.  Enjoy your stay.'
name: Gatekeeper Welcome - 3997

commands:
say Diamo... Diamo, I can't reach the pile Diamo!  Help me, please!
%force% %actor% look dungeon
name: Mad Prisoner - 3978

commands: emote screams, 'Get out of this room RIGHT NOW!'
name: Scream - 3975

commands: emote says eagerly, 'How may I help you?  Hm... You look familiar.  Perhaps I have heard of you.  Would you be %actor.name%?'
name: Shop A - 3973

commands:
say Are you really now?
peer %actor.name%
say You could be... You look about like your friend described.
say Well in that case... they wanted me to give this to you.
give flagon %actor.name%
say He bought it from Gilles, at the bar.  Drink well.
wink %actor.name%
name: Shop B - 3973

commands: say A little bit more of...  Oh!  A customer!  How may I provide thee with service?
name: Tia A - 3956

commands: emote growls, 'What is it you want, stranger?'
name: Mithroq A - 3955

commands: say Would you like a drink?  They are good for the thirst.
name: Gilles A - 3971

commands:
say 200789... 200790... 200791...
emote gets a dreamy look in his eyes as he stares at his pile of glittering gold.
emote snaps to attention, finally noticing that there is a person in the room.
say Well, if it isn't %actor.name%.  Your reputation preceeds you.  Welcome to my humble bank.
bow %actor.name%
name: Milo A - 3957

commands:
load obj 3952
give yelling platter
load obj 3951
give yelling pitcher
load 3912
give yelling spoon
name: Yelling Woman - Not Attached

commands:
* Near Death Trap stuns actor
wait 6 sec
set stunned %actor.hitp%
%damage% %actor% %stunned%
wait 2 sec
%send% %actor% You lay among the jagged rocks.
name: Near Death Trap on the Rocks - 3975
